Pitch: Grid-locked, neutral, content-first. Designed by engineers for engineers — and it still wins on clarity 70 years later
Flagship Examples: Pentagram, Vignelli, Helvetica documentary, Knoll catalogs
Signature Moves: 12-col grid, Helvetica/Akzidenz, generous negative space, asymmetric type-as-image, 2-column ratio rules, no decorative ornament
Best For: Documentation, enterprise SaaS, financial dashboards, high-trust B2B, museum/archive sites
Avoid For: Playful consumer brands, gaming, kids products, entertainment
Pair With Typography: Inter + Söhne, or Helvetica Now + Söhne
AI Prompt Seed: Design with strict 12-column grid, Helvetica or Söhne, generous negative space, asymmetric type-as-image, single accent color, no ornament. Treat type as image.

Pitch: Emptiness as luxury. The Muji school: less is more is more is more. Quiet, considered, every pixel earns its keep
Flagship Examples: Muji, Hara Design Institute, Studio Ghibli archive sites
Signature Moves: Vast white space, single hairline rule, off-black ink (#1a1a1a), seasonal palette, hand-set type, photography that breathes
Best For: Premium retail, lifestyle brands, wellness, hospitality, editorial photography
Pair With Typography: Noto Serif JP + Inter, or GT America Mono + serif body
AI Prompt Seed: Design with vast negative space, off-black ink, hairline rules only, photography that breathes. Emptiness as luxury. No more than one accent color.

Pitch: Raw, default-styled, intentionally broken. Rejects the SaaS aesthetic. Loud, weird, unforgettable
Flagship Examples: Bloomberg Businessweek, Are.na, Cash App early site, Balenciaga.com
Signature Moves: System fonts (Times, Arial), unstyled inputs, monochrome + one neon, sharp 0px corners, instant transitions, visible grid
Best For: Design portfolios, art / fashion brands, editorial, counter-culture, indie products
Pair With Typography: Times New Roman, Arial, Courier, or stark display face
Pair With Palette: Black + white + single neon (red, lime, hot pink)
AI Prompt Seed: Design with system fonts (Times/Arial), unstyled inputs, sharp 0px corners, instant transitions, monochrome plus one neon accent. Embrace the default. Reject decoration.

Pitch: Treat the screen like a magazine spread. Drop caps, pull quotes, asymmetric grids, photography as protagonist
Flagship Examples: The New York Times, Apple Newsroom, Bloomberg features, MUBI
Signature Moves: Drop caps, pull quotes, asymmetric grids, photography as protagonist, considered serif body, scroll-paced storytelling
Best For: Publications, long-form content, premium brands, case studies, narrative product pages
Pair With Typography: Tiempos Headline + Inter body, or Fraunces display + Söhne body
AI Prompt Seed: Design like a magazine spread: drop caps, pull quotes, asymmetric column grids, photography as protagonist, serif body type, scroll-paced narrative.

Pitch: Density, color, motion, layered everything. Every pixel works. The opposite of generic AI minimalism
Flagship Examples: Linear (early), Vercel ship pages, Stripe Sessions, MSCHF
Signature Moves: Saturated color, multiple type scales, overlap and rotation, custom cursors, scroll-orchestrated motion, easter eggs
Best For: Launch pages, conferences, brand campaigns, product moments, design tools
Avoid For: Long-running utility apps, accessibility-critical, low-bandwidth audiences
Pair With Typography: Distinctive display + clean sans (Editorial New + Inter)
AI Prompt Seed: Design with bold maximalism: saturated color, type at multiple scales, overlap and rotation, custom cursor, scroll-orchestrated motion, hidden easter eggs. Every pixel works.

Pitch: Minimalism with intent. Not 'I had no ideas' — 'I picked one idea and made it sing'. Distinctive type, considered motion, atmosphere
Flagship Examples: Linear, Things 3, Notion early, Arc browser, Raycast
Signature Moves: One distinctive font, monochrome + 1 accent, considered 200-400ms motion, atmospheric backgrounds (subtle gradient, noise, or texture)
Best For: Premium SaaS, productivity tools, design-led products, founder sites
Pair With Typography: One distinctive sans (Söhne, Aeonik, Suisse Int'l, Inter Display)
AI Prompt Seed: Design with refined minimalism: one distinctive sans-serif, monochrome plus a single brand accent, considered 200-400ms motion, atmospheric subtle texture. Pick one idea and make it sing.

Pitch: CRT scanlines, chrome, holographic gradients, Eurostile / OCR fonts, the future as imagined in 1999
Flagship Examples: Spotify Wrapped, Synthwave portfolios, Fontshare, hyperdrip brands
Signature Moves: CRT scanlines, chrome and holographic gradients, monospace + display, glitch effects, neon on black
Best For: Music, gaming, fashion drops, crypto/web3, NFT marketplaces
Avoid For: Healthcare, finance, enterprise, anything that must read as 'mature'
AI Prompt Seed: Design retro-futuristic: CRT scanlines, chrome surfaces, holographic gradients, monospace + display fonts, glitch effects, neon on black. The future as imagined in 1999.

Pitch: Hand-drawn marks, off-grid, textured papers, irregular shapes. Anti-Figma. Reads as human, made-by-someone
Flagship Examples: Are.na, indie publishers, ceramic studios, MailChimp early, Slack early
Signature Moves: Hand-drawn icons, irregular shapes, textured paper backgrounds, off-grid placement, warm earth palette
Best For: Lifestyle, food, wellness, indie brands, creative tools, education
Pair With Typography: Custom hand-set + clean sans, or warm humanist serif (Recoleta, Caslon)
AI Prompt Seed: Design organic and hand-crafted: hand-drawn icons, irregular shapes, textured paper backgrounds, off-grid placement, warm earth palette. Anti-Figma. Made by a human.

Pitch: Layered translucency, soft blur, vibrant atmosphere behind glass. The 2024 SaaS look — cohesive when done with restraint
Flagship Examples: Apple visionOS, Linear, Arc, Stripe, Raycast
Signature Moves: backdrop-filter blur, translucent layered cards, gradient atmospheric backgrounds, soft 8-16px radii, considered shadows
Best For: Modern SaaS, AI products, dashboards with personality, finance UX
AI Prompt Seed: Design aurora/glassmorphic: backdrop-filter blur 16px, translucent layered cards, gradient atmospheric backgrounds, soft 8-16px radii, considered subtle shadows. Restraint over saturation.

Pitch: Browser default styles. <h1> is whatever the browser says it is. The radical position: design by not-designing
Flagship Examples: CSS Naked Day, Frank Chimero's Everything Easy, default-styled Substacks
Signature Moves: No custom CSS or near-zero, system fonts, default colors, default underlines on links, no animation
Best For: Personal sites, manifestos, anti-corporate statements, blogs, archives
Avoid For: Anything trying to convert, sell, or appear professional
AI Prompt Seed: Design with browser defaults only. No custom CSS beyond minimal layout. System fonts, default link styling, default colors. Radical anti-design.
